articles.title: Kalshi Bets on Threads with New Chart-Sharing Integration
articles.summary: Kalshi launched a new feature that lets users share betting charts and market data directly to Meta's Threads platform. The integration gives prediction markets a direct pipeline into mainstream social media, potentially driving new user acquisition as betting content goes viral alongside political hot takes and cat videos.

articles.title: Lawmakers are turning on prediction markets over state secrets
articles.summary: Politicians are getting spooked about prediction markets potentially revealing classified information through betting patterns and crowd wisdom. If lawmakers start cracking down on markets that touch national security topics, it could shrink the pool of tradeable events and kill some of the most lucrative political betting opportunities.

articles.title: Is Kalshi vs Polymarket the next OpenAI vs. Anthropic? What to know about the newest fintech rivalry
articles.summary: Two US-based prediction market platforms are squaring off in what could become tech's next major corporate rivalry, with Kalshi and Polymarket competing for dominance in the rapidly growing political betting space. The winner will likely shape how Americans bet on elections and news events for years to come, potentially determining whether prediction markets become mainstream or remain niche.

articles.title: The NFL Doesn’t Want You Trading This. Polymarket Is Doing It Anyway.
articles.summary: The NFL is trying to block certain types of betting markets, but Polymarket is offering them regardless of league objections. This sets up a crucial test of whether traditional sports leagues can control prediction market innovation or if decentralized platforms will simply route around their restrictions.

articles.title: MLS’s Polymarket deal looks even worse after players’ gambling bans | Leander Schaerlaeckens
articles.summary: MLS banned several players for gambling violations just months after signing a partnership deal with prediction market Polymarket. The timing makes the league's embrace of betting markets look hypocritical and could spark regulatory scrutiny that hurts other sports-betting partnerships.

articles.title: Inflation outlook: Prediction markets see rising odds of a hotter CPI print
articles.summary: Prediction markets are pricing in higher chances that the next Consumer Price Index report will come in above expectations, signaling traders expect inflation to run hotter than the Fed wants. If CPI does spike, it kills hopes for aggressive rate cuts and sends shockwaves through markets betting on everything from Treasury yields to recession timing.

articles.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Will Announce Its IPO Before This Date? Here's What The Prediction Market Says
articles.summary: SpaceX IPO timing is drawing heavy betting action on prediction markets, with traders wagering on whether Musk will announce the public offering by a specific date. The smart money knows SpaceX's IPO timing affects not just aerospace stocks but Tesla's valuation, given Musk's cross-company leverage games.

articles.title: This 29‑Year‑Old Founder Took On a Federal Regulator to Scale Her Company—and Built an $11 Billion Giant
articles.summary: A 29-year-old founder battled federal regulators to grow her startup into an $11 billion company, proving that regulatory friction doesn't always kill ambitious businesses. Her playbook for navigating compliance while scaling fast offers a template that prediction market platforms desperately need as they face their own regulatory gauntlet.

articles.title: Everything from the last week of everything is gambling now
articles.summary: The gambling industry expanded into yet another corner of daily life this week, with new betting markets launching on everything from weather patterns to celebrity baby names. When literally everything becomes bettable, prediction markets get both more data to work with and more noise to filter through.

articles.title: XP International and Kalshi partner to bring regulated prediction markets to Brazilian investors.
articles.summary: Kalshi is expanding into Brazil through a partnership with local firm XP International, bringing regulated prediction markets to South America's largest economy. This marks a significant step in prediction markets going global, potentially opening up a massive new user base in a country where sports betting and financial speculation are already popular.

articles.title: Prediction markets face questions on Iran war bets, from regime change to nuclear detonation
articles.summary: Prediction markets are grappling with how to handle sensitive geopolitical bets about Iran, including questions around regime change and potential nuclear weapons use. These decisions will set crucial precedents for how platforms balance free speech, regulatory pressure, and the ethical boundaries of what should be tradeable.

articles.title: Kalshi sued over ouster of Iran leader prediction market
articles.summary: Kalshi is facing legal action after removing a prediction market about Iran's leadership, likely after the market generated controversy or regulatory pressure. The lawsuit could set important precedent for how far exchanges can go in pulling politically sensitive markets without facing legal consequences from traders.
